name: Demo: Swarm Image Registry
description: Deploy and validate the shared registry:2 service on Docker Swarm so k3s can pull demo images from swarm infrastructure.
notes: Planned/demo lane. Preferred registry endpoint is swarm1.lab.auzietek.com:5001. If k3s node DNS is not ready, use the swarm manager IP endpoint consistently in registries.yaml and DEMO_REGISTRY.
